name: Sleep Token
description:
'''Sleep Token''' are an English [[Rock music|rock]] band formed in [[London]] in 2016. Their music has garnered widespread media attention and popularity in recent years due to their esoteric storytelling, vulnerable lyrics, and the mixing of often two or more genres in their music to create a unique sound. To date, they have released four studio albums, two EPs, and two standalone songs. 

The band consists of two core members, only known as Vessel and II, and two touring members, known as III and IV. The members have never revealed their names or identities and prefer to be anonymous. On stage, they conceal themselves with masks, long robes, and black body paint.
